betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Crucible & Foundry§f

§aThe heart of NTM metallurgy — melt, alloy, and cast metals into any shape.§f

The §bCrucible§f sits on a heat source (firebox, ≥50,000 TU). Green outlet = recipe metals, red outlet = waste. Fill it, then route molten metal through foundry blocks to basins.

§6Units System§f:
§b1 Block§f = 9 Ingots = 81 Nuggets = 648 Quanta
§b1 Ingot§f = 9 Nuggets = 72 Quanta
§b1 Nugget§f = 8 Quanta

§6Foundry Blocks§f:
§b• Channel§f: Routes molten material from the crucible. Craft: Firebrick ×2 + Cobblestone Slab.
§b• Shallow Basin§f: 5-slot molds. Craft: Firebrick ×2 + Cobblestone Slab. Accepts side input.
§b• Full Basin§f: 9-slot/block molds. Craft: Firebrick ×4 + Cobblestone Slab. Top input only.
§b• Outlet§f: Drops material downward. Can be filtered with foundry scrap, disabled with redstone.
§b• Spill Outlet§f: Voids waste into the world (not hot, expands if not contained).
§b• Slag Outlet§f: For waste/byproducts.

§6Molds§f (craft Blank Mold first: Firebrick ×4 + Iron Ingot):
Shallow basin: Nugget, Billet, Ingot, Plate, Wires ×8, Cast Plate, Dense Wire, Blade, Shredder Blades, Press Stamp, Shell, Pipe, Caliber Casings, Weapon Parts.
Full basin: Ingot ×9, Plate ×9, Dense Wire ×9, Block, Steel Pipes.

§6Operation§f:
Place mold in basin → route channel from crucible → basin fills → cooling begins → extract with hopper or right-click. Use a shovel on foundry blocks for scrap (can remelt or use as filter).

§6Soot§f: The crucible emits consistent soot pollution — cannot be mitigated.

§eTip§f: Check JEI for exact mold recipes. All molds are made at an anvil from Blank Mold + a sample item.
